status indicator in split header (Issue #743) > falls back to idle (gray dot) when cliStatus is omitted
status indicator in split header (Issue #743) > renders each split status independently (A=running spinner, B=idle dot)

coverage.note: New status-indicator branches (spinner vs dot, idle fallback, per-split) are all exercised by the 7 added test assertions; full-suite run kept all 358 files green with no regressions.

red_green_refactor_log: RED: Added 'status indicator in split header (Issue #743)' describe block to TerminalSplitPaneContent.test.tsx (state-specific dot/spinner, omitted-prop idle fallback, per-split independence). Ran target file: 7 failed / 9 passed (16) — indicator not yet rendered.

GREEN: TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx — imported SIDEBAR_STATUS_CONFIG (@/config/status-colors) and type BranchStatus (@/types/sidebar); added optional cliStatus prop defaulting to 'idle'; built statusIndicator via useMemo (deps: statusConfig.type/className/label, splitIndex) using the Mobile canonical inline span (spinner=animate-spin border-2 border-t-transparent for type==='spinner', dot otherwise; data-testid=split-status-indicator-${splitIndex}; title only, no aria-label); wired headerExtras={statusIndicator} into TerminalSplitPane. Target file: 16 passed (16).

GREEN (Task 1.2): WorktreeDetailRefactored.renderSplitPane — computed const paneCliStatus = deriveCliStatus(worktree?.sessionStatusByCli?.[paneCli]) (deriveCliStatus already imported at L99) and passed cliStatus={paneCliStatus}; added worktree?.sessionStatusByCli to the useCallback deps (only the derived string reaches the child, so status-stable polling ticks do not break the child memo — S3-001). Mobile path (L1947-1974) untouched.
REFACTOR: No structural refactor needed — implementation reuses the existing headerExtras slot and the Mobile canonical markup; added explanatory comments for Issue #743 / S3-001 memo-safety.
GATES: npx tsc --noEmit (exit 0); npm run lint (No ESLint warnings or errors); npm run test:unit (358 files, 6710 passed / 7 skipped / 0 failed); npm run build (success).
COMMIT: 9f2f227f fix(terminal): restore AI agent status indicator in PC per-split header
commits: 9f2f227f: fix(terminal): restore AI agent status indicator in PC per-split header
notes: Per constraints: import paths use @/config/status-colors (SIDEBAR_STATUS_CONFIG) and @/types/sidebar (BranchStatus, deriveCliStatus). No 'processing' status used; spinner determined by statusConfig.type === 'spinner'. Field is statusConfig.className (no colorClass). No useWorktreeStatusByCli hook or <Spinner/> component used (inline span). a11y = title only (S3-006). TerminalSplitPane.tsx, status-colors.ts, types/sidebar.ts and the Mobile path (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1947-1974) were not modified. cliStatus prop is optional with 'idle' default so all existing call sites/tests remain unchanged (S3-002).
